description: groupby observed=True→False includes unobserved Categorical categories

_meta.explanation: observed=False causes all Categorical categories to appear in the result, including 'c' which has no data (its sum will be 0). This was the default before pandas 2.2 — a version-sensitive gotcha.
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 2. Version-sensitive: behavior changed in pandas 2.2. Tests whether agent knows Categorical semantics.
_meta.generation_recipe: pandas_mc injection: groupby observed=True→False includes unobserved Categorical categories
